name: jp-menswear-workflow
description: Japanese menswear six-step workflow with orchestrator, direct-link Step 6 mode, and reusable skills.

interface.shortDescription: v0.1.6 - 第六步直链模式默认优先提质关键槽位，不再直接拼供应商原图。
interface.longDescription: Version 0.1.6 of the Japanese menswear workflow plugin. Includes six connected skills for trend analysis, multi-source validation, SKU selection, supplier sourcing, same-style confirmation, and final material-pack delivery. When a user explicitly asks for Step 6 only and provides a product link, the plugin should skip Steps 1-5 by default, avoid long process-log style output, separate raw supplier extraction from final publish-ready assets, and prioritize premium reconstruction of key slots instead of directly composing supplier raw-detail images into the final publish-ready page.
defaultPrompt: 继续日本男装六步流程
只做第六步：基于产品链接生成素材包
检查当前项目并从正确步骤继续
